---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# MAJOR THEMES
:::

::::::::::::::::::::::::: grid
::::::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: theme-pill
Fluid Mechanics
:::

::: theme-pill
Manufacturing
:::

:::::::::::::

::::::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: theme-pill
Material Science
:::

::: theme-pill
Solid Mechanics
:::

:::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
